scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.demo: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run demo:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.demo:backend: cd backend && DENON_DASHBOARD_DEMO_MODE=true python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8080
